stemHtml: One condition to initiate the distress phase is...

options.a: the aircraft fails to arrive within 30 minutes of the ETA.
options.b: the aircraft and its occupants are threatened by grave and imminent danger and require immediate assistance.
options.c: the aeroplane has been cleared to land but fails to land within five minutes of the expected landing time.
options.d: information has been received indicating that the operating efficiency of the aircraft has been impaired but not to the extent that a forced landing is likely.
